Each sample contains one mole of the substance ~water (HzO molecules) , salt (NaCl, one mole of Nat and one mole of Cl-) , and aspirin (CgHsO4 molecules) . Pictured is a mole of aspirin molecules; not a mole of aspirin tablets; which is a quantity too large to easily represent: If a mole of aspirin tablets were arranged next to one another to cover a football field and then stacked on top of each other; they would occupy a volume 100 yards long; 53.3 yards wide, and over 20,000,000,000 miles highl
